# Employee Leave Entitlement Policy

Policy defining leave entitlements for all company employees.

All staff are entitled to 20 days of annual leave each calendar year.
Sick leave allowance is governed separately.

## Leave Entitlement

- Annual leave: 20 days per year
- Parental leave: as per statutory requirements
- Manager approval required for all leave requests
